reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content_en: It comes in individual packages so it's hygienic and convenient. This is my second purchase.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content_en: I've been using this product for over a year. It's disposable so it's hygienic. ^^

reviews.name: 차****
reviews.content: 편하게 쓰기 좋아요. 여러통째 구매하고 있습니다.
reviews.content_en: It's convenient to use. I'm buying multiple boxes at a time.

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 일회용은 처음 구매 했어요 칫솔로 닦이다가 칫솔을 계속 씹어먹어서 ... 우선 일회용이라 좋구요 이빨닦일때 손은 안무는데 치약을 먹을려고만 해서 ㅠ.ㅠ 제가 아직 서툴러서 연습을 많이해야 할것 같아요 지속 구매는 ..가격이 좀 있어서 생각해볼게요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: This is my first time buying disposable ones. My pup kept chewing on the toothbrush itself... Anyway, I like that it's disposable, but when brushing his teeth my hand stays dry, he just tries to eat the toothpaste 😅 I think I still need more practice. As for repeat purchases... the price is a bit steep so I'll think about it haha

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 일반칫솔 거부감 있어서 양치할때마다 힘들어서 안하게되더라구요 잇몸에 피나는것같길래 손가락패드 구매해봤어요 일단 칫솔보단 구석구석 닦이고 손 촉감으로 어디닦는지 알수있어서 좋았네요
reviews.content_en: My dog had a strong aversion to regular toothbrushes so brushing became difficult and I ended up not doing it. Since his gums seemed to be bleeding, I decided to try the finger pad. It's better than a regular toothbrush because it cleans hard-to-reach areas, and I can feel exactly where I'm cleaning with my fingers, which is really nice.

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content_en: I brush twice a day, but since my pup really hates toothbrushes, I only use it on my dog. It cleans gently and well.

reviews.name: 쭈****
reviews.content:
캠핑가서도 치카할수있어서 넘좋아요.
휴대하기도편하고 진작에 사용해볼껄싶네요.
다쓰고 재구매할께요~~
reviews.content_en: I can brush even when we go camping and it's so convenient. It's easy to carry too and I wish I'd tried it sooner. I'll buy it again once I finish this one~~

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
저희집 고양이가 구내염도 심하고 치주염도 심해서
칫솔질을 약하게 조금만 해도 피가 너무 나서 칫솔질을 못해요ㅠ
하지만 핏펫 손가락 패드로 살살 문질러주니 얼추 사료 찌꺼기?도 잘 빠져 나오고
꽤 용이하네요 ㅎ.ㅎ
reviews.content_en: My cat has severe stomatitis and periodontitis, so even gentle brushing causes too much bleeding and I can't brush at all 😢 But with the FITTEST finger pad, when I gently rub it on, the food debris comes out pretty well and it's quite easy to use haha

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 일반칫솔은 거부가 심해서 손가락패드로 사니까 그래도 괜찮네요. 일회용이라 보관과 처리가 편해요.
reviews.content_en: My dog really resists regular toothbrushes, so using the finger pad works pretty well instead. Since it's disposable, storage and disposal are convenient.

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content_en: Great to take with us when traveling!

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content: 치석많은 우리아이! 손가락 칫솔 처음 써봐요 구석구석 닦을 수 있어 좋네요~ 효과는 좀 더 사용해봐야 알 것 같아요
reviews.content_en: My child has a lot of tartar buildup! This is my first time using a finger toothbrush and I love that I can clean all the hard-to-reach spots~ I'll need to use it more to see the actual results

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 역시 잘먹습니다. 화식이라 데워주는 번거로움 있지만 건강을 위해.꾸준히 먹이려고해요
reviews.content_en: As expected, he eats it well. Since it's raw food, there's the hassle of heating it up, but for his health... I'm planning to keep feeding it to him consistently

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content_en: My hamster Gangju who's scared of toothbrushes is brushing well with this~ 🐹

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
상품필수 정보에는 제조국명이 대한민국으로 되어있어서 반은 속은
기분이네요....
reviews.content_en: The product information says it's made in South Korea, but it feels like I was half deceived....
